titleStmt.title: SII 26.757: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 757. (A.R. No. 706 of 1909.) ĀLAMBĀKKAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: West and south walls of the same shrine.
This inscription is damaged in several places. It contains the praśasti of the king beginning with Tiṅgaḷēr taru taṉṟoṅgal, etc.

It states that the Peruṁguṟi Perumakkaḷ of śrī-Madurāntakach-chatuppēdimaṅgalam, a Brahmadēyam in Poygai-nāḍu in Rājēndraśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu assembled under a pipal tree and decided to make a gift of land, 3 mā in extent, to the temple of the goddess Saptamātirukkaḷ situated in the northern quarter of the village, as Tiruchchennaḍaippuṟam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiṅkaḷer taru taṉṟoṅkal veṇkuṭaikki puṇarntu ko ṭintu tātaiyu tiruttamaiyaṉaiyum kuṟikkoḷ taṉṉiḷaṅ kokkaḷaiyum ne tam tirupputalvar tam
yum tuṉṟeḻil vāṉavaṉ va miṉavaṉ kaṅkaṉ I ppoṉṉaṇiccuṭarmaṇi makuṭañ cūṭṭippaṭar pukaḻāṅkavaṟ kāvari nāṭaruḷi pāṅkamar tātaimuṉavaṉ tapota vikkiramaṉāraṇaṉ taṉcakkara
taruḷaṟ kayānmavataritta Oru patāṉāḷāl tirumaṇimauli vāḻiyama ḻiyuḷ � māṉāparaṇan ponmuṭiyānāpparumatiṭ pacuntalai porkaḷattarintu vāḻviya kaḻal virakeraḷaṉai muṉaivaiyiṟ piṭittu taṉtivāraṇa kata
kkaṭakkaḷiṟṟālutaippittaruḷi Antamil perumpukaḻ cuntara ṭai ṇ veṅkaḷattiḻantu tan muṭiviḻat talaivirittaṭi taḷar ntoṭi tollaiyil mullaiyūr turatti Olkalil veṇāṭṭaraicai ceṇ
ṇāṭṭotukki mevu pukaḻ Irā muvar keṭa muṉintu viṭal keḻuvil lavaṉ pukko [velaikkeḻu kāntalūrccālai kalamaṟuppittāhavamalla]
ṉum Aiñcakkevitaṉṟāṅkarum paṭai ṉ ceṉaiyum kaṇ vicaiyātitta mutali ttuṭai nimir poṉ noṭaiyaṅkaripura
viyoṭum piṭittu tannāṭaiyil jayaṅ nnār koḷḷippākkai kkiramapāhuvin makuṭamum muṉṟaṉakkuṭaintu maṇṭalamu nteḻu kaṭaliḻampukkilaṅkecaṉākiya vikkiramapāṇ
ṭiyaṉ parumaṇi makuṭamum kāṇṭa nakucciyilum viḷiṅkumuṭi kavitta viracalā� �rkaḷa kārkkaḷiṟintu kav ṭikkātaliyoṭum taṉṟavvaiyai piṭittu tāyai mukkari
ya Āṅkavamānam niṅkutaṟkāka miṭ ḻiluḻantu veṅka ttaraicaṉ poṉ koḷiḻattaraicaṉākiya śrīvalla rāja Elloḷi taṭamaṇi muṭiyuṅkoṇṭu vaṭapulattirukālāvatum porupaṭai ṉaṭāttik kaṇṭar tiṉaka
raṉ nāraṇan kaṇapati vaṇṭalar nneṉṟeṉai palavaraicarai muṉaivaiyiṟ turatti vampalar teri māḷikai takarpittiḷakkamil tātai munnavanta cuntarakkaḷiṟṟu cakkaravartti vikkirama nāraṇaṉṟaṉ perum paṭaiñarai Ēvi muṉpu Amar Āhavamallaṉ
Aiñciṉa neṉṉum sāha ṇpuṉal periyāṟṟam karai pūṇṭura kaṭaka mānakarakavaiyil kiḷar neṭuvel teluṅkavic caiyaṉṟampiyar Iruvarum vampiyar cilaikkai Attirājaṉum pittiya kaḷiṟṟu piṭarkkai coḻaṉum koṇṭai
yarājaṉum kuṉicilai muñcayaṉum taṇṭanāyakaṉ tāṉataṉañciyaṉum mi yaṉum viramāṇikkaṉum Eṉappaṭaiñaroṭetir ṟuṇa viyarum vākai viccayaṉ makaṉum mātāvum Eṉumivar mutaliyar puṉaikaḻalaraicaroṭu
ṟuṇṇena piṭipitteḻarai Ilakkamum pāḻpaṭac ciṉavil pūṇṭu patiyaippoṭi paṭuttanamaiyil Īṇṭurakkam tai lanaṭāttivarruṭi kavitai vitaittum natiyil pār paru māḷikaiy paṭaroḷi parappi Āṅkamar nakarvaiyil veṅkaimiteḻuti Uyar
nāṭṭuvittiyaṭicai villavar minavar veḻakula caḷukkiyar pallavar kocalar vaṅkaṇar koṅkaṇar cintura Uyyaṇar ciṅkaḷar paṅkaḷar Āntar mutalinar Arai ṟaikaḷum Āṟilonṟavaniyuḷ kūṟukoḷ poruḷkaḷum Ukantu nānmaṟaiyavar mukantu
ceytu Araicuviṟṟirunta jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻan Uyarnta perumpukaḻ kovirācakecaripanmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājātirājatevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 1 Āvatu ka ṉāl rājendraciṅkavaḷanāṭṭup poykaināṭṭu
brahmadeyam śrīmaturān=takaccatuppetimaṅkalattu peruṅkuṟi perumakkaḷom Iṟṟaināḷāl pakal nammūr kiḻaippāccoṟi kuḷattu Araiciṉ ki
ḻeme kūṭṭak kuṟaivaṟak kūṭi Iruntu paṇiyāl paṇittu nammur vaṭakkil saptamātirukkaḷu(kkaḷu)kku tiruccennaṭaikku kuṭutta nilamāvatu śrītevi
vatikku meṟku kāḷavaḻikkut teṟku Āṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāñcatirattu O ṟku meṟku muṉṟāñcatirattu kiḻakkaṭaiyap pāṟcoṟi kuḷamenṟu perkūvappaṭ
mum niṭaṅ 1mā m Āka niṭaṅ 3mā Innilam munṟumāvukkum cantirātittaval pati Iṟaiyiṟukkap peṟuvārākavum nammur tāmiṭuṅkālaṅkaḷil tāmiṭuvār Ippatin mun
ṟāntāme Iṭakkaṭavarkaḷākavum Innilam (1/2)
nilam munṟu māvum cantirātittaval tiruccennaṭai
ppuṟṟil śrīkraṣṇakiramavittanum vai
kāṇa tānamalla kunṟāna paṇṭi
I(v)(o)r sabhaiyomukkup piḻaittarākavum Ipparicu I
sabhaiyiliruntu mu mpait tiruveṅkaṭakkiramavittanum pa
ramavittanum koṭa citāna ṇiyil Ivvū—
�tittaval Itu celva
Digital edition of SII 26.757 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
